title: Landing page loads with video background and overlay
description: Verify the landing page loads successfully on multiple browsers and devices with the video background autoplaying silently and the dark overlay visible for text readability.

steps.description: Open the landing page URL on desktop browser.
Verify that the video background starts playing automatically without sound.
Verify that the dark overlay is visible on top of the video to ensure text is readable.
Repeat the open action on a mobile browser.
Confirm video background plays silently and overlay is present on mobile.
Test on multiple major browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge).
Validate consistent video and overlay behavior across all tested browsers.

title: Responsive navigation menu functions correctly on all devices
description: Check that the navigation menu is accessible and usable on desktop and mobile devices including hamburger menu behavior on smaller screens and smooth scrolling to page sections.

steps.description: Load the landing page on desktop.
Click on navigation menu items.
Page smoothly scrolls to the corresponding section.
Load the landing page on a small screen/mobile viewport.
Hamburger menu is visible and clickable.
Tap the hamburger menu to open and select a menu item.
Menu closes and page smoothly scrolls to the selected section.
Test responsiveness on multiple screen sizes from small mobiles to large desktops.
Navigation adapts layout correctly for all viewport sizes.

title: Contact form submission via EmailJS, Formspree, and Netlify
description: Validate that the contact form is correctly submitting data via all three integrated methods and that form validation works according to defined rules.

steps.description: Open contact form on the website.
Fill the form with valid Arabic name, valid Kuwaiti phone number (+965... or local format), valid email, service type, message longer than 10 characters, and check privacy policy checkbox.
Submit the form selecting EmailJS as submission method.
Verify successful submission indication and no validation errors.
Repeat the above for Formspree submission method.
Confirm form data received successfully with proper API response.
Repeat for Netlify Forms submission.
Validate success notification is shown after submission.
Test form submission with invalid phone format.
Verify validation error message related to phone number.
Test form submission with missing required fields and without privacy acceptance.
Verify that submission is blocked and errors are shown for each missing/invalid field.

title: Customer rating system accepts ratings 1-5 and feedback
description: Ensure that the star rating system allows users to select ratings from 1 to 5, accepts textual feedback, and submits correctly with validation.

steps.description: Navigate to rating section.
Select each star rating from 1 through 5 and enter corresponding feedback for each.
Submit the rating with valid customer name and feedback.
Verify success message confirming rating submitted.
Attempt submission with rating outside allowed range (e.g., 0 or 6).
Check form validation prevents submission and shows appropriate error.
Try submitting without feedback or customer name.
Validate that missing required fields trigger errors and block submission.

title: Image gallery lazy loads and lightbox functions
description: Validate images in gallery load lazily as user scrolls and clicking an image opens it in a lightbox with navigation controls.

steps.description: Open gallery section.
Initial images visible are loaded; others load on scroll (lazy loading behavior).
Click on a gallery image.
Image opens in a lightbox overlay.
Navigate to next and previous images using lightbox controls.
Lightbox changes images accordingly and closes when requested.
Verify images can be downloaded from the gallery interface.
Downloaded files correspond to correct gallery images.

title: SEO meta tags, sitemap.xml and robots.txt validation
description: Ensure the website’s SEO components are correctly implemented including meta tags in HTML, presence and correctness of sitemap.xml and robots.txt files.

steps.description: Visit the home page and inspect the HTML source.
Verify meta tags include proper title, description, Open Graph tags, and structured data schema.
Access sitemap.xml URL.
Check that sitemap XML loads correctly and contains the expected URLs.
Access robots.txt file URL.
Verify robots.txt is present and contains valid directives.
Make a change in sitemap.xml and verify if the updated version is served.
Confirm sitemap updates reflect immediately after change.

title: Progressive Web App offline support and caching
description: Verify that the website functions correctly offline using the service worker and PWA features including caching of critical resources.

steps.description: Load the website online to activate service worker caching.
Turn off network connectivity (simulate offline).
Reload the website.
Verify the site loads correctly with cached content and main functionalities still work.
Try to navigate through multiple pages/sections while offline.
Confirm navigation and content remain available without errors.
Test submission of forms or interactions while offline.
Verify appropriate error messages or offline handling are displayed.

title: Multiple direct contact methods usability
description: Test each direct contact method integration (phone call link, WhatsApp chat, social media links, and vCard generation) for correct behavior.

steps.description: Click the phone contact link.
Phone dialer app opens with correct number prefilled.
Click the WhatsApp contact link.
WhatsApp chat window or app opens targeting the provided number.
Click social media contact links.
Each social link opens correct social media page in a new tab.
Click the vCard generation link.
vCard contact file is generated and downloaded successfully.

title: Google Analytics tracks user interactions and form submissions
description: Check that Google Analytics correctly logs page visits, navigation actions, and contact form submissions for data analysis.

steps.description: Open the site and browse through multiple sections.
Google Analytics records page views and navigation events.
Submit a valid contact form.
Google Analytics tracks the form submission event.
Perform multiple interactions such as rating submission and downloading images.
Verify corresponding user events are sent to Google Analytics.

title: Website responsiveness and RTL layout correctness
description: Ensure the site layout is responsive on all screen sizes with proper right-to-left Arabic text and correct usage of Tajawal and Cairo fonts.

steps.description: Open the site on mobile, tablet, and desktop screen sizes.
Verify content adjusts fluidly and navigation adapts on all devices.
Check text direction on all pages.
Confirm text flows from right to left consistently.
Inspect fonts used in the website.
Validate Tajawal and Cairo fonts are correctly applied in Arabic text elements.
